text: Standing at the threshold of a sleek, contemporary space filled with the soft glow of neon lights, I am drawn in by curiosity and a hint of anticipation. Inside, I am confronted by the bold declaration of 'R+D'—a place dedicated to research and development. The wall text and digital displays provoke reflection, speaking to confusion, clarity, and the fragility of perception. I feel a kind of invigorated uncertainty—a sense of potential discovery flavored by the awareness of my own fallibility as an observer, and the reminder of how easily focus can be lost. This is a space that asks me to question not only what I see, but also how and why I see.
